intended_use: BioTraceIO Vision is a Computed Tomography (CT) and Magnetic Resonance (MR) image processing software package available for use with ablation procedures. BioTraceIO Vision is controlled by the user vi
intended_use_full: BioTraceIO Vision is a Computed Tomography (CT) and Magnetic Resonance (MR) image processing software package available for use with ablation procedures. BioTraceIO Vision is controlled by the user via a user interface. BioTraceIO Vision imports images from CT and MR scanners and facility PACS systems for display and processing during ablation procedures. BioTraceIO Vision is used to assist physicians in planning ablation procedures, including identifying ablation targets and virtual ablation needle placement. BioTraceIO Vision is used to assist physicians in confirming ablation zones. The software is not intended for diagnosis. The software is not intended to predict ablation volumes or predict ablation success.
target_condition: Soft tissue lesions (liver and kidney) suitable for ablation treatment (microwave ablation or cryoablation)
ground_truth: Manual expert segmentation and registration assessment; clinical site imaging data with diagnostic reading procedures
other_metrics: Liver Segmentation CT: Mean DICE 0.98; Liver Segmentation MR: Mean DICE 0.93; Kidney Segmentation CT: Mean DICE 0.91; Liver Ablation Target Segmentation CT: Mean DICE 0.82; Kidney Ablation Target Segmentation CT: Mean DICE 0.79; Liver Ablation Zone Segmentation CT: Mean DICE 0.88; Kidney Ablation Zone Segmentation CT: Mean DICE 0.76-0.78; Kidney Ice Ball Segmentation CT: Mean DICE 0.80-0.83; Liver Vessels Segmentation CT: Mean DICE 0.72, Mean Centerline DICE 0.76; Liver Registration Pre-ablation MR–Pre-ablation CT: MCD 5.04 mm; Kidney Registration Diagnostic CT–Pre-ablation CT: MCD 4.61 mm; Liver Registration Pre-ablation CT–Post-ablation CT: MCD 4.09 mm; Kidney Registration Pre-ablation CT–Post-ablation CT: MCD 3.06 mm; Liver Registration Pre-ablation MR–Post-ablation CT: MCD 4.75 mm
